creator: pav@FreeBSD.org
text:
> ok it seems there is a build issue on 7.0
> it builds fine on 6.2 6.3 but not 7.0.
> 
> it seems 7.0 is not installing the libossaudio from the core os build

It does not build fine on 6.3, see the log snippet in my first email.

I have just looked into the 7.0-RELEASE installation CD, and there is no
libossaudio there either.

Can I ask for the location of libossaudio.* files on your computer?
Any ports installed? uname -a output?

-- 
Pav Lucistnik <pav@oook.cz>
              <pav@FreeBSD.org>

Focus is a greased pig on the field of efficiency.
  -- Quincy
